title: BlackboardEntry.payload — worker.error shape
description: JSON Schema for the payload JSONB column when entry_type='finding' and subject='worker.error'. Posted by the Worker base class exception handler (src/shared/workers/base.py) when a worker's run() raises an unhandled exception. Status is always 'abandoned'. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1; ADR-011 (blackboard write boundary). This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

error.description: str(exception) — the string representation of the exception that caused the worker to fail. May be empty if the exception has no message.

worker.description: Declaration name of the worker that failed. Matches Worker.declaration_name and the .intent/workers/<name>.yaml filename stem.
